evidence: This is an awesome tv show! I highly recommend it to anyone (not just sci/fi fans).
This is a must see for everyone! Check it out! you will never regret it. :)
A great classic and always a fantastic show!!
I highly recommend it to any Star Trek fan!!

It makes her happy, though, so I am impressed.

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi content and enjoys emotionally intense stories. They appreciate fast-paced narratives and are less concerned with production quality, focusing more on the enjoyment and emotional impact of the shows.
